6.0.3.changelog: Fix Tasks/Subtasks not being populated or updated in story files during enhanced sprint pipeline

6.0.4.changelog: Added Step 8b (Edge Case Hunter review) — runs in parallel with code review and adversarial review. Leverages new BMAD 6.0.4 review-edge-case-hunter.xml task for method-driven path enumeration.

6.2.0.changelog: Consolidated review (BMAD 6.2 runs adversarial + edge case + acceptance internally). E2E TDD step runs red-phase E2E tests in parallel with unit TDD. Updated for .claude/skills/ architecture.

6.4.0.changelog: Skill renames /bmad-bmm-* → /bmad-* (6.3.0 agent consolidation: Quinn QA, Bob SM, Barry → Amelia). Pipeline restructured 11 → 9 steps: Step 3 is now a fresh-context Opus runner that executes BMAD's bmad-create-story/checklist.md; Step 4 unit-TDD dropped (Amelia writes Kent-Beck-style unit tests inline in dev-story); Step 10 AC-trace dropped (Acceptance Auditor inside Step 7 covers it). Phase 0 epic-context cache compiled once and reused across Steps 1/5/7. New unattended-by-default behavior (only ambiguous merge conflicts pause), per-story auto-commit at Step 9 with submodule-first sequence (never auto-pushes), codebase anti-leak rules injected into Steps 5/6/8/9 (no BMAD/story-ID references in code or main-repo commits), and a deferred-decisions log artifact for every judgment call. Hotfix port: version label bumped only — Step 0 self-detection logic unchanged for 6.4 surfaces.
